title: 微信读书中 ePub 文件内容渲染不完整
author: resetsix
body: 嗨，感谢作者 @krahets 和其他社区贡献者制作了精美的 ePub 格式文件，以便支持在移动端设备也能学习 `hello-algo`。 将 ePub 文件导入至微信读书后，我在实际阅读遇到了一些内容丢失或渲染异常问题。 > 所导入文件：[hello-algo_1.3.0_zh_typescript.epub](https://github.com/krahets/hello-algo/releases/download/1.3.0/hello-algo_1.3.0_zh_typescript.epub) 具体问题如图所示 ## 移动端渲染效果 有部分内容丢失 ## Web完整效果 预期在移动端出现红色方框中内容。 网页具体对应地方：https://www.hello-algo.com/chapter_computational_complexity/time_complexity/#2

title: [Bug] Visualized Execution from PythonTutor not working
author: beatrix-chan
body:
## Description

Hello Algo's visualization is provided via PythonTutor, common problems (this issue wants to solve) include:

- Displayed raw links instead of code + visual (EN, JP, RU)
- Code too long (JP, RU)

## Impacted chapters and languages

> Assume the ones listed below are the one displayed the raw links. Error messages are included if it's related to "Code too long".

- 4.1 Arrays
  - [Japanese - 4.1.1's 1. only](https://www.hello-algo.com/ja/chapter_array_and_linkedlist/array/#4)
  - [Russian - 4.1.1's 1. only](https://www.hello-algo.com/ru/chapter_array_and_linkedlist/array/#4)
- 5.1 Stacks
  - [Japanese - 5.1.1](https://www.hello-algo.com/ja/chapter_stack_and_queue/stack/#511)
  - [Russian - 5.1.1](https://www.hello-algo.com/ru/chapter_stack_and_queue/stack/#511)
- 6.1 Hash Table
  - [English - 6.1.1](https://www.hello-algo.com/en/chapter_hashing/hash_map/#611)
  - [Japanese - 6.1.1 only](https://www.hello-algo.com/jp/chapter_hashing/hash_map/#611)
  - [Russian - 6.1.1 only](https://www.hello-algo.com/ru/chapter_hashing/hash_map/#611)
- 6.3 Hash Algorithm
  - [English - 6.3.4](https://www.hello-algo.com/en/chapter_hashing/hash_algorithm/#634)
  - [Japanese - 6.3.4](https://www.hello-algo.com/ja/chapter_hashing/hash_algorithm/#634)
  - [Russian - 6.3.4](https://www.hello-algo.com/ru/chapter_hashing/hash_algorithm/#634)
- 7.1 Binary Tree
  - [Japanese - 7.1.2 both](https://www.hello-algo.com/ja/chapter_tree/binary_tree/#712)
  - [Russian - 7.1.2 both](https://www.hello-algo.com/ru/chapter_tree/binary_tree/#712)
- 7.2 Binary Tree Traversal
  - [Japanese - 7.2.2's 1.](https://www.hello-algo.com/ja/chapter_tree/binary_tree_traversal/#1_1) **Error Message**:
    ```
    Error! your code is around 5664 URL-encoded bytes, which is too long for this tool.
    Shorten your code to less than 5600 bytes and re-try. [#ErrorCodeTooLong]
    ```
- 7.4 Binary Search Tree
  - [Japanese - 7.4.1's 1., 3.](https://www.hello-algo.com/ja/chapter_tree/binary_search_tree/) **Error Messages**:
    ```
    Error! your code is around 5648 URL-encoded bytes, which is too long for this tool.
    Shorten your code to less than 5600 bytes and re-try. [#ErrorCodeTooLong]
    ```
    ```
    Error! your code is around 5914 URL-encoded bytes, which is too long for this tool.
    Shorten your code to less than 5600 bytes and re-try. [#ErrorCodeTooLong]
    ```
- 8.1 Heap
  - [Japanese - 8.1.1 only](https://www.hello-algo.com/ja/chapter_heap/heap/#811)
  - [Russian - 8.1.1 only](https://www.hello-algo.com/ru/chapter_heap/heap/#811)
- 9.3 Graph traversal
  - [Japanese - 9.3.1's 1 only](https://www.hello-algo.com/ja/chapter_graph/graph_traversal/#1) **Error Message**:
    ```
    Error! your code is around 5780 URL-encoded bytes, which is too long for this tool.
    Shorten your code to less than 5600 bytes and re-try. [#ErrorCodeTooLong]
    ```
- 13.3 Subset-Sum problem
  - [Russian - 13.3.1's 3 only](https://www.hello-algo.com/ru/chapter_backtracking/subset_sum_problem/#3) **Error Message**:
    ```
    Error! your code is around 5981 URL-encoded bytes, which is too long for this tool.
    Shorten your code to less than 5600 bytes and re-try. [#ErrorCodeTooLong]
    ```
## (Failed) Attempted Troubleshoots

- Switch browsers (Google Chrome, Zen Browser, Brave Browser)
- Incognito mood
- Force reload

## Temporary Solution

- Visit their respective visualizer in other language versions (Simplified Chinese and Traditional Chinese are complete)
- Copy raw link to browser (**Warning: comments might not be in the same language**)

## Related but non essential problems

> Checklist below can be converted to sub-issues or new issues if krahets and/or maintainers believe it's worth following up.

- [ ] **Incomplete visualizations in English Version**: Some visualizations are provided in all languages except English (e.g. 6.1.2)

title: The English terms of the "Hanota" problem
author: khoaxuantu
body:
Hi @krahets, it's been a long time.

Recently, I visited this [page](https://www.hello-algo.com/en/chapter_divide_and_conquer/hanota_problem) and found its title (Hanota problem) is quite unfamiliar in terms of English.

I believe the term "Hanota" is translated from the Chinese term, which is 「汉诺塔」。
But in English, we have a well-known different name for this problem, which called "Tower of Hanoi".

So I think we should make a change in English version's title, shall we?

title: Possible Migration from MkDocs
author: beatrix-chan
body: Just read that [Materials for MKDocs is going into maintenance mode](https://github.com/squidfunk/mkdocs-material/issues/8523) and there seems to be a lot of changes to [MkDocs 2.0](https://squidfunk.github.io/mkdocs-material/blog/2026/02/18/mkdocs-2.0/). The Materials for MkDocs team recommended switching over to their new product which is [Zensical](https://squidfunk.github.io/mkdocs-material/blog/2025/11/05/zensical/). Will hello-algo be considering to switch over?

Since I primiraly use python so I used Python for reference also as I learnt hello algo using python only therefore I used it.

Since the Chinese version was more updated I used it and translated it into English and verified it with one of my friend.

Thanks for such great work always love hello algo.

title: Incorrect multi-line comment format.
author: Lingxuan-Ye
body:
在[行文风格约定]一节中，Rust 的多行注释有误。当前格式为：

```rust
/**
 * 多行
 * 注释
 */
```

然而，这是**外部文档注释**的多行注释形式，它是承担语义的，在没有尾随项的情况下，它会抛出硬错误：

```text
error: expected item after doc comment
 --> src/lib.rs:1:1
  |
1 | / /**
2 | |  * 多行
3 | |  * 注释
4 | |  */
  | |___^ this doc comment doesn't document anything
```

一种解决方案是使用正常的多行注释：

```rust
/*
 * 多行
 * 注释
 */
```

但根据 [Rust Style Guide]，我更推荐的解决方案是：

```rust
// 多行
// 注释
```

[行文风格约定]: https://github.com/krahets/hello-algo/blob/2213a59ff6c9ed2d82c6e3e16e9024ca116fbcf6/docs/chapter_preface/suggestions.md#%E8%A1%8C%E6%96%87%E9%A3%8E%E6%A0%BC%E7%BA%A6%E5%AE%9A
[Rust Style Guide]: https://doc.rust-lang.org/style-guide/#comments

title: The space complexity of a BST should be O(N)
author: kurt-liao
body:
In this [page](https://www.hello-algo.com/zh-hant/chapter_computational_complexity/space_complexity/#4-o2n), you mentioned that the space complexity of the binary tree is 2^n.
However, I checked Stack Overflow's answer and asked GPT; they all said it's O(n).
